meta.title: Clipboard Manager for macOS
meta.description: A clipboard history manager for macOS. Automatically captures and organizes everything you copy. Instantly recall past clipboard content with a keyboard shortcut.

hero.headline: Clipboard Manager for macOS
hero.title: ClipHolder
hero.description:
Automatically captures and organizes everything you copy.
Instantly recall past clipboard content with a keyboard shortcut.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you copy, at your fingertips.
features.description: ClipHolder automatically manages your clipboard history and dramatically boosts your productivity.

history.title: Clipboard History
history.description: Automatically captures text, images, PDF, and file references. Recall anything you've copied at any time.

keyboard.title: Keyboard Driven
keyboard.description: Instantly open the history panel with your preferred keyboard shortcut. Paste at full speed using only the keyboard.

multiContent.title: Beyond Text
multiContent.description: Not just text — images, PDF, and file references are all managed together. Never lose a copy again.

multilingual.title: 11 Languages
multilingual.description: Available in 11 languages including English and Japanese. Automatically adapts to your system language.

support.label: Support
support.title: Want to support the developer?
support.description:
ClipHolder is a free app.
Your support makes a big difference in keeping development going.
support.note: Even a small amount is greatly appreciated 🙏

download.title: Try ClipHolder today
download.description:
A free clipboard manager for macOS.
Download and start using it right away.

footer.appDescription:
A clipboard history manager
for macOS

notice.title: Manual update required for v0.1.1 and v0.2.0
notice.description: Auto-update is broken on these versions due to an App Sandbox misconfiguration. Please download v0.2.1 manually to restore auto-update for future releases.
